The truth is that airpods arenât even 10 years old. That means we are the first generation who are part of this new age technology. That means no evidence has been published on the long term impact of wearing something equivalent to a wifi router next to your ears. This is truly scary for me to watch and be witnessing my generation being brainwashed into scrolling endlessly and wearing emf radiation tech on them..

This is my solution:

1. Throw your airpods in the trash.
2. Buy $15 wired earbuds.
3. Tell my friends about it. 

Share this with a friend who needs to see this.

And vote below your option ð¥ðð¼

Manti Teâo is a linebacker whose career became defined by both elite on field performance and one of the most surreal off field stories in sports history. Emerging from Notre Dame as a dominant defensive leader, Teâo built his reputation on instincts, tackling, and emotional leadership, culminating in a Heisman finalist season that placed him at the center of college football. That rise was later overshadowed by the revelation that he had been the victim of an elaborate fake girlfriend hoax, a story that captivated and confused the sports world. The situation shifted public perception overnight, turning sympathy, scrutiny, and debate into part of his narrative. Beyond the headlines, Teâoâs legacy reflects resilience, professionalism, and the reminder that even elite athletes can be caught in circumstances far beyond the field. #NotreDameFootball #MantiTeo #BrianKelly #PostgameInterview #CollegeFootball
